history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a mobile game or community interface screen with a donation popup over a clan/members list.

Main Subject:
A centered dark modal window with a yellow-orange circular icon containing a white check mark, displaying the title “Donate Berhasil” and a confirmation message beneath it, with a large green button labeled “OKE” near the bottom of the modal.

Setting:
This is a screenshot of a smartphone app interface in portrait orientation, with a dark teal and black background and multiple UI panels. The top status bar and navigation elements are visible, including the time “17:38” and various signal/battery icons.

Visual Details:
The background contains a header area with the text “NAKAMA REALM” on the left and several rounded buttons on the right. Below the header is a wider banner labeled “Member Baru” with a teal outline and an icon on the left, plus a rectangular countdown-style button on the right reading “1 Jam 46 menit.” Two large dark buttons appear side-by-side under that banner, labeled “Donate” and “Lounge.”  
On the left side of the screen are member entries shown as small circular avatar images with labels such as “LEADER,” “VICE LEADER,” and “ADMIRAL” in small tags, along with additional text lines. On the right side are columns of numbers next to small icons (unreadable icons that look like currency/points). At the bottom right there is a rounded button labeled “Browse Clan.”  
The donation modal is centered, with white text on a dark background. The check mark icon is bright and centered above the title. The text inside the modal includes “Kamu donate 150 Widujem. Treasury sekarang 3,0M.” and a second line that appears partially obscured or cut off by the UI, but the visible portions are in Indonesian. The green “OKE” button spans much of the modal width and has white text.

Visible Text:

Grade X

Practical Summary:
This screenshot shows a clan or community app screen with a successful donation confirmation modal. The modal titled “Donate Berhasil” includes a check-mark icon and an “OKE” button, while member and ranking lists remain visible behind it.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
